facebook.caption:
POV: you finally found the good Bún Quậy in Phu Quoc.

Bún Quậy Bạch Đằng on 32A Đường Bạch Đằng is pulling a 4.9 from 203 reviews. That number is almost impossible for a local noodle spot. The broth is the reason. Locals have been eating here for years while tourists walk straight past.

If you're skipping the resort breakfast for one meal, make it this one.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
